mapper.insert: insert into exam_record_chat_message (record_id, sender_id, sender_role, sender_name, content, message_type, is_deleted) values (#{recordId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{senderName}, #{content}, #{messageType}, 0)

insert into exam_record_chat_read (record_id, user_id, user_role, last_read_message_id, last_read_at) values (#{recordId}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{messageId}, now()) on duplicate key update last_read_message_id = greatest(ifnull(last_read_message_id, 0), values(last_read_message_id)), last_read_at = now()
